历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 6038 → 6067 → 6318 → 7238 → 5610. In 2024, due to adjustments in major groups (re-selection of chemistry/unrestricted grouping), the ranking significantly dropped to 7238, rebounding to 5610 in 2025. The fluctuation range over the past 5 years is approximately 5610–7238, with a baseline of about 5610 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Fujian Province was 118 in 2021, 120 in 2022, 119 in 2023, 121 in 2024, and 129 in 2025, showing a slight expansion trend. In 2026, the plan is 98, a decrease of 31 from 2025, a reduction of about 24%, significantly easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. Ranked 31st in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, stable in the 29–32 range in recent years, belonging to the top tier of national universities. No significant negative events in reputation evaluation for 2026. Ranked 16th in overall Douyin popularity (high heat), with high short video exposure, reflecting high application attention. No abnormal historical admission records for Hunan University, with a stable admission trend. It has 8 A-/A/A+ level disciplines including Chemistry (A), Mechanical Engineering (A), Business Administration (A), Civil Engineering (A-), Applied Economics (A-), Control Science and Engineering (A-), Electrical Engineering (A-), and Computer Science and Technology (A-), with balanced strength in engineering and management disciplines, strongly attracting candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering and Automation, Electronic Information/Communication are highly popular and recommended, highly matching Hunan University's advantageous disciplines. In 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in Fujian Province is expected to be about 204,000, an increase of about 6% from 2025, intensifying overall competition. The Physics Category undergraduate batch is stable in the 423–449 score range. Hunan University is located in Changsha City, Hunan Province, with no direct regional preference association with Fujian Province. The university's enrollment proportion in Fujian is about 3–5%, a moderate level, with no obvious regional bias.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 5610, a significant 24% reduction in the 2026 Physics Category enrollment plan (easing competition), a 6% increase in the total number of candidates in Fujian Province (intensifying competition), stable university reputation, and high Douyin popularity, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will significantly move forward (ranking number decreases). The predicted minimum ranking is about 4950, with a range of 4700–5200.

- Microelectronics Science and Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is about 4950, with a range of 4700–5200. Candidates with rankings within 4700 can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors like Computer Science and Technology, Electrical Engineering and Automation, etc. Candidates with rankings around 4950 are advised to target Tier 2 majors such as Intelligent Manufacturing Engineering, Statistics, Mathematics as the main focus, while also considering lower-ranked Tier 1 majors. Candidates with rankings near 5200 can consider Tier 3 majors as safety options, with Chemistry (Chemistry A discipline) offering high cost-performance.

Business Administration (A), Applied Economics (A-), and other economics and management disciplines have outstanding strength, highly matching the History Category majors (Economics, Finance, Business Administration, Journalism and Communication, etc.), attracting liberal arts candidates.
